headline: FDA Accepts Gilead's Filing for Weekly Oral Yeztugo for HIV Prevention
summary: Gilead seeks FDA approval for once-weekly oral Yeztugo for HIV prevention, aiming to expand access with a new long-acting PrEP option.

raw.headline: FDA Accepts Gilead's Filing for Weekly Oral Yeztugo for HIV Prevention
raw.summary: Gilead seeks FDA approval for once-weekly oral Yeztugo for HIV prevention, aiming to expand access with a new long-acting PrEP option.

headline: Jetstream Venture Fund Secures Position in Rejuvenate Bio, Investing Alongside Industry Giant Merck
summary: Jetstream Venture Fund (Jetstream), an innovative interval fund dedicated to opening access to institutional-grade deal flow for a wider mainstream audience, today announced it has established an investment interest in Rejuvenate Bio.

headline: AstraZeneca Stock Down 7% in 3 Months: Should You Buy, Sell or Hold?
summary: AZN shares fell after a camizestrant setback, but blockbuster drugs, oncology growth and a deep pipeline support long-term targets.

headline: Nivi, Inc. and MSD Collaborate to Expand HPV Disease Awareness and Cervical Cancer Prevention Through AI-Powered Platform
summary: Nivi, Inc., a digital health innovator specializing in personalized healthcare guidance and consumer insights, and MSD (known as Merck Sharp & Dohme LLC in the United States and Canada, a subsidiary of Merck & Co., Inc., Rahway, N.J., USA) today announced a global initiative to enhance consumer awareness of HPV diseases and HPV-related cervical cancer prevention across emerging markets, beginning with India, Indonesia, and Thailand.

raw.headline: Nivi, Inc. and MSD Collaborate to Expand HPV Disease Awareness and Cervical Cancer Prevention Through AI-Powered Platform

headline: Protillion Biosciences Announces Drug Discovery Collaboration with Merck
summary: CARLSBAD, Calif., June 16, 2026--Protillion Biosciences, Inc., a leader in lab-in-the-loop AI drug design, today announced the signing of a multi-target discovery collaboration and license agreement with Merck, known as MSD outside the United States and Canada. The agreement combines Protillion’s proprietary platform with Merck’s global expertise in the discovery of novel therapeutic candidates.
